title: pagiantha sphaerocarpa
intro: Pagiantha sphaerocarpa, also known as the "Indian root," is a perennial plant native to the tropical forests of Asia, belonging to the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pagiantha sphaerocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the treatment of various respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or powder for medicinal use, and its herbal preparations are commonly consumed in traditional Indian medicine.
